//: Example of ~/.g2cc/config.json (first run writes real defaults + a random authToken; missing keys fall back to defaults — you only need the overrides). NEVER commit a real config.json.

notifications.//: Android package → priority (call|timer|sms|email|info). Unlisted packages = 'info'. NOTE: the map REPLACES the defaults wholesale when present (no per-package merge) — copy the defaults you want to keep.

de.//: DE shell (overhaul.md). rootNav 'menu' = the proven category launcher (default); 'ribbon' = the MRU recents ribbon (flip + restart to try on glass). recentsDepth = MRU windows shown after the fixed Main slot, before the 'frequent'+'All>' slots (Adam's spec: active + 3 = 4; keep small so the top strip never overflows). fullBleed (Phase 3 §3.3 staging, ribbon-only): true = borderless full-width windows with the action menu in a 3-cell top-bar scroller (the 96px left column reclaimed); false = the proven in-window chrome. Flip on glass to test.
